personalInfo.name: Nitish Kr Das
personalInfo.heroTagline: Architecting scalable systems, optimizing data pipelines, and building robust APIs.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.heading: Builder at heart.
paragraphs: I am a software engineer focused on backend architecture and systems design. My approach to engineering is grounded in correctness, performance, and scalability. I don't just write code; I design systems that can endure high loads and evolve with business needs.

With a background in building distributed services, I enjoy tackling complex problems involving data consistency, concurrency, and cloud infrastructure. When I'm not optimizing SQL queries or refactoring microservices, I'm exploring the latest in GenAI to automate workflows.

list.title: CloudSense
list.description: Full-stack IoT system that collects sensor data from ESP32 devices via MQTT, stores in MongoDB Atlas, and displays real-time on a React dashboard. Demonstrates hybrid cloud deployment.

list.title: Songbook
list.description: A digital hymnal collection app for NELC songbooks. Browse, search, and view hymns with lyrics. Supports dark/light theme and offline access.

codeBlock.docstring:
"""
Software is a liability, not an asset. The goal is to solve problems with the minimum amount of complexity required.

1. Make it work.
2. Make it right.
3. Make it fast.
"""
